title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§234.  Budget to include additional salary

The governing authority of the parish of Rapides shall annually budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries fixed in R.S. 16:233.  

Added by Acts 1973, No. 118, §4.
doc_text:
§234.  Budget to include additional salary
The governing authority of the parish of Rapides shall annually budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries fixed in R.S. 16:233.
Added by Acts 1973, No. 118, §4.
